creator: fernape@FreeBSD.org
text:
(In reply to Li-Wen Hsu from comment #4)
Thanks Li-Wen,

The problem is reproducible in the package cluster:

https://docs.freebsd.org/cgi/getmsg.cgi?fetch=2265234612+0+current/freebsd-pkg-fallout
https://docs.freebsd.org/cgi/getmsg.cgi?fetch=2265020833+0+current/freebsd-pkg-fallout

This started, according to pkg-fallout, on Dec 18th:

https://docs.freebsd.org/cgi/getmsg.cgi?fetch=374770743+0+current/freebsd-pkg-fallout

Since then, we have created new quarterly branches by copying main, but only quarterly fail, never main.
